name: Storm Dragon's Return
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>嵐</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>らん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>還</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>帰</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 banished monster; Special Summon it to your field, but return it to the hand during the End Phase. You can only activate 1 "Storm Dragon's Return" per turn.
eff: Target 1 banished monster; Special Summon it to your field, but return it to the hand during the End Phase. You can only activate 1 "Storm Dragon's Return" per turn.

action: Returns from your field to your hand
summoning: Special Summons the player's banished monsters
Special Summons the opponent's banished monsters to the player's field
